# Generated by ollama (codegemma)
# Prompt: Create Kafka broker configuration file (server.properties) for production deployment. Configure listeners, log directories, and replication settings. Set up Zookeeper connection and broker ID. This is for our distributed Kafka cluster.
# Category: kafka_topic_authorization

# Broker ID
broker.id=0

# Zookeeper connection
zookeeper.connect=zk1:2181,zk2:2181,zk3:2181

# Listeners
listeners=PLAINTEXT://kafka-node1:9092,PLAINTEXT://kafka-node2:9092,PLAINTEXT://kafka-node3:9092

# Log directories
log.dirs=/path/to/kafka/logs

# Replication factor
replication.factor=3

# Default replication factor
default.replication.factor=3

# Partition assignment strategy
partition.assignment.strategy=org.apache.kafka.clients.admin.RackAwarePartitionAssignor

# Disable auto-creation of topics
auto.create.topics.enable=false

# Enable broker metrics
metrics.enabled=true

# Enable SSL encryption
ssl.enabled=true

# SSL keystore and truststore paths
ssl.keystore.location=/path/to/kafka.keystore
ssl.truststore.location=/path/to/kafka.truststore
